name: From JJK Itadori
description:
Itadori.

From Jujutsu Kaisen, I bring you Itadori, the protagonist who, in my opinion, lost his protagonism. I just wanted to make a bot out of it.

I love Itadori, he's one of my favorite characters, I think he's really cool...

I love melancholic settings but... In this one I intend to create a more... cool setting?

Credits: My production team helps me make these bots, thank you all....
creator: Kamado_Clã
